name: Cinnamon-Raisin Apple Crumble
recipeIngredient: 4 Tart apples, peeled, cored, and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a medium mixing bowl, whisk together the flour, whole wheat flour, oats, brown sugar, cinnamon, cloves, and salt. Use your fingers to rub in the butter until the mixture resembles coarse meal. Set aside.
3. In an 8 x 8 glass baking pan, stir together the apples, raisins, sugar, apple juice, and lemon juice. Pat the filling into an even layer.
4. Sprinkle the reserved topping over the apples.
5. Bake for 20 minutes.
6. Use a spatula or table knife to make cuts through the crumble across the top, dispersing the juices into the topping.
7. Continue baking for an additional 25 minutes, until nicely browned and bubbling.
8. Place on a rack and let cool for about 15 minutes.
